common.tagline: The operating system of Eminat Group
shell.noModuleAccess: You do not have access to this module. Contact your administrator.
shell.devTooltip: Connected to the DEVELOPMENT database (not production)
notif.title: Notifications
login.errDomainReset: Only Eminat Group corporate emails are allowed
login.errSendReset: Error sending email. Please try again.
login.sentBody: Check your inbox — we sent you a link to reset your password.
login.heroSub: Integrated management for marketing, research, finance, medical and human resources.
login.resetSub: Enter your corporate email and we'll send you a reset link.
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Request access at
launchpad.subtitle: Select an area to get started.
launchpad.seeAllDesc: Open the panoramic view with all the holding's brands.
launchpad.emptyTitle: Your account has no areas assigned yet.
launchpad.emptyDesc: Ask an administrator to activate your role in the Admin panel.
admin.roleSaveNetErr: Network error while saving the role.
admin.create.pwdMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
admin.create.netErr: Network error while creating the user.
admin.create.title: Create user
admin.credsHint: Hand it to the user through a private channel. They'll change it on first sign-in.
admin.reset.netErr: Network error while updating the password.
admin.reset.title: Reset password
admin.reset.intro: You're about to set a new password for
admin.reset.introCont: We can't see the previous password — this one replaces it entirely and we show it to you so you can hand it over.
admin.edit.fillRequired: Please complete first name, last name and email.
admin.edit.netErr: Network error while updating the user.
admin.edit.title: Edit user
admin.edit.emailChangeWarn: Changing the email updates the Auth account and the usuarios row in a single operation. If either part fails, the other is reverted.
admin.del.netErr: Network error while deleting the user.
admin.del.heirNoRef: {name} has no responsable_ref configured and cannot inherit tasks.
admin.del.deactivated: User deactivated (activo=false). Their history is preserved.
admin.del.deactivateNetErr: Network error while deactivating the user.
admin.del.hasTasksOne: Has {count} assigned task. Transfer it to another active member of the same area to be able to delete them.
admin.del.hasTasksMany: Has {count} assigned tasks. Transfer them to another active member of the same area to be able to delete them.
admin.del.noMembers: No active members in the same role
admin.del.heirNoRefHint2: configured. Edit them first or choose someone else.
admin.del.statusLabel: New status (applies to ALL inherited tasks)
admin.del.statusKeep: (no change) — each task keeps its current status
admin.del.statusPending: To approve — status: To approve · verified unchanged
admin.del.atomicNote: Atomic — the inheritance, notification cleanup, and account deletion run in a single transaction. If anything fails, everything rolls back and no task is lost.
admin.del.title: Delete user
admin.del.warnLead: This action deletes the row in
admin.del.warnTail: AND the Auth account (if it exists). It's permanent.
admin.del.hint: If they have activities, I'll open a panel to inherit them to another member before deleting. If you prefer to keep everything intact and just remove access, use Deactivate.
